parameters.query: INSERT INTO ghl_sync_state (entity, location_id, last_synced_at, records_synced, updated_at) VALUES ('contacts', $1, NULL, 0, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (entity, location_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT entity, location_id, last_synced_at, last_cursor, records_synced FROM ghl_sync_state WHERE entity = 'contacts' AND location_id = $1

SELECT surrogate_key, contact_id, email, phone, source, utm_source_first, utm_campaign_first, tags, custom_fields, ghl_updated_at FROM dim_contacts WHERE contact_id = ANY($1::varchar[]) AND is_current = TRUE

={{ $json.inserts.length > 0 ? 'INSERT INTO dim_contacts (contact_id, location_id, email, phone, first_name, last_name, source, tags, contact_type, dnd, custom_fields, utm_source_first, utm_medium_first, utm_campaign_first, utm_content_first, utm_term_first, landing_url_first, referrer_first, gclid_first, fbclid_first, campaign_id_first, utm_source_last, utm_medium_last, utm_campaign_last, utm_content_last, landing_url_last, valid_from, valid_to, is_current, change_reason, ghl_created_at, ghl_updated_at, synced_at) SELECT r.* FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS r(contact_id varchar,location_id varchar,email varchar,phone varchar,first_name varchar,last_name varchar,source varchar,tags text[],contact_type varchar,dnd boolean,custom_fields jsonb,utm_source_first varchar,utm_medium_first varchar,utm_campaign_first varchar,utm_content_first varchar,utm_term_first varchar,landing_url_first text,referrer_first text,gclid_first varchar,fbclid_first varchar,campaign_id_first varchar,utm_source_last varchar,utm_medium_last varchar,utm_campaign_last varchar,utm_content_last varchar,landing_url_last text,valid_from timestamptz,valid_to timestamptz,is_current boolean,change_reason varchar,ghl_created_at timestamptz,ghl_updated_at timestamptz,synced_at timestamptz) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING' : 'SELECT 1' }}
UPDATE ghl_sync_state SET last_synced_at = NOW(), last_cursor = $1, records_synced = records_synced + $2, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE entity = 'contacts' AND location_id = $3
